description: The per-stage completion record (RA VerticalCompletion) for one stage of a record's approval chain. One per configured stage (REQ_DEPARTMENT, PROCUREMENT, BUDGET, FINANCE, MANAGEMENT). Tracks who the stage is assigned to, who must approve, the per-approver auto-approval limit, whether it auto-approved, and when. The COMPLETION dimension of the three-dimension requisition model (STAGE and STATUS are the other two). Drives auto-approval, segregation of duties, and the financial-edit revert.

fields.name: completionId
fields.label: Completion No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for one stage completion so audit entries, assignments, and reverts attach to a specific stage of a specific record.

fields.name: recordId
fields.label: Record
fields.validation: the approved record's id; immutable; the engine also serves PO/Award/Supplier/PaymentSchedule
fields.purpose: Binds the completion to the record under approval; one engine serves requisition, PO, award, supplier-onboarding, and payment-schedule records, so the target varies by recordType.

fields.name: stage
fields.label: Approval Stage
fields.validation: one of the configured chain stages (verticalId); chain order fixed, stages configurable; unique per (recordId, stage)
fields.purpose: Which stage of the chain this completion represents; determines the routing strategy (REQ_DEPARTMENT pinned to requester, FINANCE approval-only, MANAGEMENT terminal) and whether the financial-revert applies (FINANCE/MANAGEMENT only).

fields.name: completionStatus
fields.label: Stage Status
fields.validation: linear NOT_STARTED -> IN_PROGRESS -> AWAITING_APPROVAL -> APPROVED; only legal backward move is the financial revert APPROVED -> AWAITING_APPROVAL on auto-approved FINANCE/MANAGEMENT
fields.purpose: The lifecycle state of this stage; all completions APPROVED is what flips the record to FULLY_APPROVED and is one of the three dimensions whose agreement gates COMPLETED (axiom A3).

fields.name: assignedToId
fields.label: Assigned To
fields.mandatoryCondition: stage is assignable (not FINANCE/MANAGEMENT approval-only); REQ_DEPARTMENT pinned to requester
fields.validation: active user; least-loaded from the routing-rule assignee pool; FINANCE/MANAGEMENT are approval-only and cannot be assigned (axiom A5); an APPROVED stage cannot be reassigned
fields.purpose: Who owns the stage's work; first assignment moves NOT_STARTED -> IN_PROGRESS. Pinning REQ_DEPARTMENT to the requester and barring assignment on Finance/Management enforces axiom A5.

fields.name: approvalRequestedToId
fields.label: Approval Requested To
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when approval is requested or when auto-approved (records the bucket approver for audit)
fields.validation: active eligible approver with approval.approve; SoD: != record requesterId/buyerId (axiom A6); for auto-approval the nearest-bucket approver
fields.purpose: Who must decide the stage; moving IN_PROGRESS -> AWAITING_APPROVAL targets this user. On auto-approval it records the nearest-bucket approver for the audit trail even though no email is sent (axiom A7).

fields.name: approverLimit
fields.label: Approver Limit
fields.validation: >= 0; effectiveLimit = approvalLimit ?? 200000 (configurable DEFAULT_LIMIT); a configured 0 stays 0 and never falls back; compared inclusively against totalAmountInBase
fields.purpose: The auto-approval ceiling for the resolved approver. amountInBase <= approverLimit auto-approves (axiom A7); 0 forces manual review for any positive amount. The threshold the nearest-bucket selection sorts on.

fields.name: isAutoApproved
fields.label: Auto-Approved
fields.validation: set true only by the auto-approve path; true marks the no-second-person approval that the financial-revert can roll back on FINANCE/MANAGEMENT
fields.purpose: Flags an approval reached within threshold with no human approver, the only no-second-person path and always logged (axiom A6). Distinguishes which Finance/Management completions the financial-edit revert may roll back (axiom A7); manual approvals are never reverted.

fields.name: approvedById
fields.label: Approved By
fields.mandatoryCondition: set on manual approval; null on auto-approval
fields.validation: the acting approver on manual approve; null when isAutoApproved=true; SoD enforced (not the record's requester/buyer)
fields.purpose: Records the human who approved the stage for the audit trail and the OTIF stats path; null on auto-approval distinguishes the two approval routes.

fields.name: approvedAt
fields.label: Approved At
fields.validation: now() on approve (manual or auto); cleared on a financial revert
fields.purpose: Timestamps the approval for the audit trail and the approver OTIF streak (remainingTime = allowedDuration(priority) - elapsed); a manual approve drives the HIT/MISS stats, auto-approval does not (axiom A14).

fields.name: revertedCount
fields.label: Reverted Count
fields.validation: >= 0; incremented each time a financial edit reverts this completion
fields.purpose: Counts how many times an auto-approved Finance/Management stage was reverted to AWAITING_APPROVAL by a payTerms/paymentSchedules edit (axiom A7); an audit signal for repeated financial churn.

invariants: A2 stage advance gated by mandatory fields; COMPLETION is independent of record STAGE
A3 all completions APPROVED is a precondition of COMPLETED
A5 Finance/Management approval-only (no assignedToId); APPROVED stage cannot be reassigned
A6 SoD: approver != requester/buyer; auto-approval is the only no-second-person path and is logged
A7 auto-approval requires amountInBase <= approverLimit (default 200000); editing payTerms/paymentSchedules reverts auto-approved Finance/Management to AWAITING_APPROVAL
A13 every assignment, decision, and revert is audited and broadcast
